description: An exchange's self-published statement of operating posture: software commit, public signing key fingerprint, fee policy in effect, audit posture. The provider/requester analog of `dev.cocore.compute.attestation` for the exchange role. Settlements MAY strong-ref the active attestation so verifiers can pin which exchange-software / signing-key combination produced the record.

exchange.description: Exchange DID. MUST equal the repo this record is published in.

policy.description: Strong-ref to the dev.cocore.compute.exchangePolicy this attestation covers.

softwareVersion.description: Identifier for the exchange-side software running. Free-form; e.g. 'cocore-services@v0.3.2 (commit a1b2c3d)'. Lets verifiers match settlements to a specific build.

signingKeyFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the public key the exchange signs settlements with. Should match the verificationMethod publicKeyMultibase in the exchange's did document.

auditPosture.description: Human-readable note about how the exchange is run (e.g. 'single-tenant on Railway, no third-party access, source on github.com/cocore/services'). Out-of-band trust signal.
